text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During lunch one day, I notice a crowd gathered
in the central plaza. Standing in the center of all
the students holding up their phones is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: How do you guys like this?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Here's a special pose just for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chan... Cute Curren Chan...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me! Can I post this on Umastagram
with hashtag "CuteCurrenChan"?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'd love that! ♪ Fill your whole feed up
with me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The photo shoot seems to be quite a hit. The air
is practically shimmering from the heat of
everyone's enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, lunch is almost over! Time really flies when
I'm hanging out with all of you.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! But we haven't all got a picture with
you yet!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I know. I wanna take pics with everyone too...
choice_data_list: How about we take a group pic?

Let's line everyone up and take selfies
efficiently!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's a great idea! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We'll take more selfies next time! ♪ Everybody,
gather around for a bird's-eye pic! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We can take one with this drone the director lent
me! ♪ Come on, you get over here too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Say cheese! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she has quite a way with people.
Everyone loved the photo shoot!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, can I count on you to gather
everyone up for me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Everybody! Line up in front of me, please! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And you're the last person! ♪ Thanks for coming
today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was amazing! I think everyone felt the
cuteness! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I knew I could count on you! ☆ Ehehe, thanks for
the help! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, we manage to finish the photo shoot
by the end of lunch period. Curren Chan looks
quite pleased!
